title: User Signup with valid email and password
description: Verify that a new user can successfully sign up with a valid email and password.

steps.description: Navigate to the signup page
Enter a valid email address
Enter a strong password
Click the signup button
Confirm that signup is successful and user is redirected to a protected area

title: User Login with correct email and password
description: Verify that existing users can log in successfully with correct credentials.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page
Enter a registered email address
Enter the correct password
Click the login button
Confirm successful login and redirection to the user dashboard

title: Login attempt with incorrect password
description: Verify the system shows an error message and prevents login when an incorrect password is entered.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page
Enter a registered email address
Enter an incorrect password
Click the login button
Confirm display of an invalid credentials error message and no login occurs

title: Session Persistence after page refresh
description: Verify that user session persists after refreshing or reopening the browser tab without requiring login again.

steps.description: Log in with valid credentials
Refresh the browser page
Confirm the user remains logged in and no redirect to login page occurs

title: Create and Save a New Memory Draft
description: Verify users can create a new memory, save it as draft, and that drafts persist across sessions.

steps.description: Log in and navigate to the memory creation page
Enter memory content into the message editor
Save the memory as a draft
Confirm that draft is saved successfully without errors
Log out and log in again
Navigate to drafts section
Confirm the previously saved draft is present and content matches input

title: Schedule a Memory for Future Delivery
description: Verify that users can schedule a memory or message to be delivered at a specified future date and time.

steps.description: Navigate to memory creation page after login
Enter content for the memory
Select a future date and time for delivery
Submit and schedule the memory
Confirm memory is saved with the correct scheduled delivery time

title: Warning Display when navigating away with unsaved changes in Memory Creation
description: Verify that the system warns the user about unsaved changes when attempting to leave the memory creation page.

steps.description: Start creating a new memory and make changes without saving
Attempt to navigate away from the memory creation page
Confirm display of a warning dialog about unsaved changes

title: Accessing Digital Vault content
description: Verify authenticated users can view and manage items stored in their secure digital vault.

steps.description: Log in and navigate to the digital vault page
Confirm that vault contents are displayed securely and correctly
Add a new asset or legacy information to the vault
Confirm new asset is saved and visible in the vault

title: Subscription Plan Upgrade
description: Verify users can upgrade their subscription from Basic to Pro and that payment is processed successfully.

steps.description: Log in and navigate to the plans page
Select the Pro subscription plan
Complete payment using Toss Payments
Confirm successful payment processing and immediate update of user plan status

title: Subscription Plan Downgrade
description: Verify users can downgrade their subscription from Pro to Basic and that system records are updated immediately.

steps.description: Log in and navigate to the plans page
Select the Basic subscription plan
Confirm and submit downgrade request
Confirm the user plan status updates immediately in the database

title: Create a Public Memorial Space
description: Verify that authenticated users can create a public memorial space and configure its settings correctly.

steps.description: Log in and navigate to the memorial space creation page
Enter memorial space details and select 'public' option
Submit and create the memorial space
Confirm memorial space is created and accessible publicly

title: Create a Private Memorial Space
description: Verify that authenticated users can create a private memorial space and set proper access controls.

steps.description: Log in and navigate to the memorial space creation page
Enter memorial space details and select 'private' option
Configure access controls
Submit and create the memorial space
Confirm memorial space is created as private and access is restricted as configured

title: Recipient Verification Success Flow
description: Verify that message recipients can successfully complete the verification workflow to access messages.

steps.description: Navigate to recipient verification page using a valid verification link
Complete identity confirmation steps as required
Confirm successful verification and message access granted

title: Recipient Verification Failure with invalid identity
description: Verify system handles recipient verification failure when the identity confirmation does not match expected criteria.

steps.description: Navigate to recipient verification page with a valid link
Enter incorrect or mismatched identity information
Submit verification details
Confirm access is denied and appropriate error message is displayed

title: Landing Page responsiveness on mobile devices
description: Verify that the landing page layout adjusts correctly for mobile viewport sizes without overlapping or clipped content.

steps.description: Open the landing page on a mobile device or simulate mobile viewport
Confirm all sections including hero, feature introductions, and pricing overview are well formatted and fully visible

title: Landing Page responsiveness on tablet devices
description: Verify that the landing page layout adjusts correctly for tablet viewport sizes without UI issues.

steps.description: Open the landing page on a tablet device or simulate tablet viewport
Confirm all UI components are properly arranged and no clipping or overlap is present

title: Smooth animations without visual glitches
description: Verify that page animations including splash screen and scroll-triggered animations run smoothly without jank or glitches.

steps.description: Navigate through different pages observing splash screen and animated elements
Confirm animations render smoothly on supported browsers and no visual glitches occur

title: No Console Errors or Warnings during Runtime
description: Verify that the application runs without console errors related to hydration, invalid DOM nesting, or other warnings.

steps.description: Load various pages and interact with features in the app
Confirm that no console errors or warnings appear related to hydration or DOM issues

title: API Call Permission Error Handling
description: Verify that the frontend gracefully handles 401/403 errors returned from API calls without hidden failures.

steps.description: Trigger API calls that require authentication with expired or missing tokens
Confirm that appropriate error messages are shown and user is prompted to re-authenticate

title: All meta page titles and descriptions are unique
description: Verify that each page has a unique meta title and description tags for SEO and sharing purposes.

steps.description: Navigate to all main pages including landing, authentication, memory creation, vault, plans, memorial space, and recipient pages
Verify that meta title and description tags differ meaningfully between pages

title: Open Graph images update without caching issues
description: Verify that Open Graph images for social sharing update correctly without getting stuck in caching.

steps.description: Update Open Graph images for a page
Check social share previews after updates
Confirm the latest images appear promptly with no caching artifacts
